title: Peckia densicoma
taxonomy: Peckia densicoma is classified within the family Sarcophagidae, which is a family of flies commonly known as flesh flies. The family Sarcophagidae belongs to the order Diptera, which includes all flies. This order is further divided into several suborders, including Brachycera and Nematocera. Within the family Sarcophagidae, Peckia densicoma is a genus of flies, and it is likely classified as such due to its specific characteristics and physical traits. The classification of Peckia densicoma is based on its morphology, behavior, and genetic relationships with other similar species.
